name: ElevenLabs
description: The world's most advanced AI audio platform.
longDesc: ElevenLabs provides the most realistic, versatile, and context-aware AI audio tools for creators and publishers to generate lifelike speech in any language.

name: Jasper
description: Best AI writing assistant for enterprise teams.
longDesc: Jasper is the generative AI platform for business that helps your team create content tailored to your brand 10x faster wherever you work online.

name: Canva Magic Studio
description: All-in-one AI design tool for everyone.
longDesc: Canva Magic Studio brings together the best AI-powered design tools to help you create stunning visual content, presentations, and videos in seconds.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine with real-time answers.
longDesc: Perplexity AI is an answer engine that delivers accurate, trusted, and real-time answers to any question with cited sources.

name: Midjourney
description: The most creative AI image generator.
longDesc: Midjourney is an independent research lab exploring new mediums of thought and expanding the imaginative powers of the human species through high-quality AI art.

name: ChatGPT
description: The most popular and versatile AI chatbot.
longDesc: ChatGPT by OpenAI is a powerful conversational AI that can help with writing, coding, learning, and complex problem-solving across various domains.

name: Luma Dream Machine
description: Next-gen AI video generator from text and images.
longDesc: Dream Machine is a highly capable AI model that makes high-quality, realistic videos fast from text instructions and images.

name: Grammarly AI
description: Advanced AI writing partner for clarity and tone.
longDesc: Grammarly's AI-powered writing assistant helps you communicate with confidence and make your writing clear, concise, and professional.

name: Descript
description: AI video and podcast editor via text transcript.
longDesc: Descript is the only tool you need to write, record, transcribe, edit, collaborate, and share your videos and podcasts by editing text.

name: Notion AI
description: Integrate AI directly into your productivity workspace.
longDesc: Notion AI helps you work faster, write better, and think bigger, all within the notes and docs you use every day.
